tagline: Changing our clients' lives by changing the way they live outdoors.

hero.headline: 50 Years of Transforming Outdoor Living
hero.subheadline: From custom landscapes and paver patios to pools and outdoor kitchens, Farrell's has been turning ordinary yards into extraordinary retreats since 1976. Let our second-generation family team handle the vision and the hard work -- you just enjoy the results.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Everything Your Outdoor Space<br class="hidden md:block"> Needs Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From the garden center to the finished landscape, Farrell's handles every detail so your property looks its absolute best year-round.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Installation
cards.description: Custom designs brought to life with premium plantings, trees, and shrubs. Every project backed by our 5-year workmanship warranty.

cards.title: Paver Patios & Hardscaping
cards.description: Patios, walkways, retaining walls, and steps built with Unilock materials by ICPI-certified installers. Built to last decades.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Living
cards.description: Complete outdoor entertainment spaces with kitchens, fire features, and seating areas that extend your home into the open air.

cards.title: Pool Installation
cards.description: Professional pool design and installation seamlessly integrated with your surrounding landscape for the ultimate backyard oasis.

cards.title: Lawn Care & Fertilization
cards.description: Full-season programs including mowing, fertilization, weed treatment, aeration, and overseeding to keep your lawn thick and green.

cards.title: Snow Removal & Plowing
cards.description: Reliable winter services for driveways, parking lots, and walkways so your property stays safe and accessible all season long.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Outdoor Space

steps.title: Schedule a Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your vision. We'll visit your property, listen to your ideas, and provide an honest, detailed proposal within a week. No pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our ICPI-certified crew handles everything from design to installation using premium materials. You'll stay informed at every stage with regular check-ins.

steps.title: Enjoy Your New Outdoors
steps.description: Relax in your transformed space knowing it's backed by a 5-year workmanship warranty. We're always a phone call away if you need anything.

about.label: Why Northwest Ohio Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 1976 -- Now Serving the Next Generation
about.description: Founded by Tony and Wendy Farrell nearly 50 years ago, Farrell's is now proudly led by the second generation -- Clayton and Katelynn. With over 3,000 projects completed across Northwest Ohio and Northeast Indiana, we bring ICPI certification, Unilock authorization, and a BBB A+ rating to every job. Our team treats your property like our own.

features.title: Unilock Authorized Contractor
features.description: We use premium Unilock products and are factory-authorized for installation, ensuring materials and craftsmanship meet the highest standards.

features.title: 5-Year Workmanship Warranty
features.description: Every project we complete is backed by our 5-year warranty. If something isn't right, we come back and fix it -- no questions asked.

features.title: BBB A+ Rated Since 2000
features.description: Over two decades of A+ accreditation with the Better Business Bureau. Our reputation is built on trust, transparency, and quality work.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written proposal upfront. No hidden fees, no change-order games -- just honest pricing for honest work.

guarantee.headline: Our 5-Year Workmanship Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any aspect of our work doesn't meet your expectations, we'll come back and make it right at no additional cost. We've stood behind this promise for nearly 50 years and over 3,000 projects. Your satisfaction isn't just a policy -- it's the foundation our family business is built on.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I schedule my project?
faqs.answer: We recommend reaching out 4-6 weeks before your ideal start date, especially for spring and summer projects. However, we always do our best to accommodate timelines. Lawn care and snow removal services can typically begin within 1-2 weeks.

faqs.question: Do you offer free estimates?
faqs.answer: Yes! Every project begins with a free on-site consultation where we listen to your vision, assess the space, and provide a detailed written proposal. No obligation, no pressure -- just honest guidance from experienced professionals.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Bryan, Archbold, Defiance, Napoleon, Swanton, Whitehouse, Waterville, and surrounding areas throughout Northwest Ohio and Northeast Indiana. If you're unsure whether you're in our service area, just give us a call.

faqs.question: What makes Farrell's different from other landscapers?
faqs.answer: We're a true full-service operation -- garden center, design, installation, lawn care, and snow removal all under one family-owned roof. Our ICPI certification, Unilock authorization, and 5-year workmanship warranty set us apart. Plus, we've been doing this for nearly 50 years.

faqs.question: Do you handle commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We serve commercial clients with landscape design, installation, lawn maintenance, and snow removal. Our team has the equipment and experience to handle properties of any size while maintaining the same attention to detail we bring to residential work.

testimonials.name: Cynthia C.
testimonials.text: Clayton and Kevin were great. They went above and beyond. We were very pleased with the unique design and ultimate appearance. They checked in with us often and remained attentive to our needs.

testimonials.name: David J.
testimonials.text: My wife and I are very happy with the service which we had performed by Farrell's. Clayton is very personable and understanding. Juan and Orlando did an amazing job with the patio.

testimonials.name: Shari S.
testimonials.text: Professional, prompt and affordable. Farrells have serviced my lawn and snow removal for over 8 years. Consistently reliable and always do quality work.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform
Your Outdoor Space?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation consultation and detailed proposal. We'll visit your property, listen to your vision, and show you what's possible.
